# Keevan Store — Complete Site Reference for LLMs and AI Systems

> Keevan Store is a creator commerce platform for East African authors, educators, coaches, and digital creators to sell e-books, guides, templates, and digital products directly to customers through branded storefronts with Pesapal payment processing.

## Platform Overview

Keevan Store serves creators and buyers across four East African countries: **Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, and Rwanda**. The platform supports five currencies: **UGX, KES, TZS, RWF, and USD**.

### Pricing Model
- **Free to join**: No monthly fees, no listing fees, no setup costs
- **10% commission**: Platform fee deducted only on successful sales
- **Creators keep 90%**: Of every verified transaction
- **Free withdrawals**: No additional fees for requesting payouts

### Minimum Withdrawal Amounts by Currency
| Currency | Minimum Withdrawal |
|----------|-------------------|
| UGX | 50,000 |
| KES | 1,500 |
| TZS | 30,000 |
| RWF | 20,000 |
| USD | 20 |

### Supported File Types
- PDF (.pdf)
- EPUB (.epub)
- MOBI (.mobi)
- ZIP (.zip)
- Maximum file size: 4 MB
- Cover images: JPEG, PNG, WebP (max 2 MB)

### Payment Methods
- Mobile money (MTN, Airtel)
- Debit and credit cards
- Bank transfers
- Processor: Pesapal (East Africa's leading payment gateway)

## Site Structure

### Public Pages (SEO-indexed)
- `/` — Homepage with feature grid, how-it-works steps, and FAQ
- `/about` — Platform overview and mission
- `/features` — Complete feature list (12 features)
- `/pricing` — Pricing comparison table and fee breakdown
- `/faq` — 20 frequently asked questions with detailed answers
- `/contact` — WhatsApp support contact information
- `/terms` — Terms of Service
- `/privacy` — Privacy Policy
- `/refund-policy` — Refund Policy
- `/product/[slug]` — Individual product detail pages (SEO-optimized, dynamic)
- `/store/[handle]` — Creator storefront pages (SEO-optimized, dynamic)

### Restricted Pages (noindex)
- `/signup` — Creator registration
- `/login` — Creator login
- `/forgot-password` — Password reset request
- `/update-password` — New password form
- `/checkout/[slug]` — Payment checkout
- `/download/[slug]` — File download
- `/creator/*` — Creator dashboard (auth required)
- `/admin/*` — Admin dashboard (auth required)
- `/buyer/dashboard` — Buyer purchase history (auth required)
- `/order/*` — Order lookup and success pages

## Key Features

1. **Branded Storefronts**: Each creator gets a personalized store URL and product links
2. **No Buyer Accounts**: Customers purchase without creating an account
3. **Pesapal Integration**: East African payment gateway with server-side verification
4. **Instant Delivery**: Signed, time-limited download URLs after payment confirmation
5. **Sales Analytics**: Dashboard with views, purchases, downloads, and conversion rates
6. **Product Management**: Add, edit, update, or unpublish products anytime
7. **Secure Storage**: Files in Supabase cloud storage with signed URLs
8. **Mobile-Friendly**: Storefronts work on all devices without an app
9. **Multi-Currency**: Stores can operate in UGX, KES, TZS, RWF, or USD
10. **SEO-Optimized**: Product pages have structured data, canonical URLs, and OG tags

## Structured Data Implemented

- **Organization** schema on all pages
- **WebSite** schema on all pages
- **FAQPage** schema on homepage (5 Q&A), pricing (3 Q&A), FAQ (20 Q&A), product pages (3 Q&A)
- **Product** schema on homepage (platform stats), pricing (Creator Plan), product detail pages
- **BreadcrumbList** schema on product pages (3 items), store pages (2 items), checkout (3 items)
- **ContactPage** schema on contact page
- **Article** schema on content pages where applicable

## Creator Workflow

1. Sign up for free at /signup (no credit card required)
2. Choose store currency (UGX/KES/TZS/RWF/USD)
3. Upload product file (PDF/EPUB/MOBI/ZIP, up to 4 MB)
4. Set price, write description, add cover image
5. Share store link or individual product links
6. Receive payment via Pesapal (mobile money/card/bank)
7. Customer downloads file automatically
8. Track earnings in dashboard
9. Request withdrawal when balance meets minimum

## Technical Information

- **Frontend**: Next.js 14 (React), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Next.js API routes
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage
- **Payment Gateway**: Pesapal API v3
- **Hosting**: Vercel
- **Analytics**: Vercel Analytics
- **Monitoring**: Sentry
- **Security**: CSRF protection, rate limiting, magic byte file validation, CSP headers, HSTS

## Contact Information

- WhatsApp Support: +256768345905
- Website: https://keevanstore.in
- Creator Signup: https://keevanstore.in/signup
